column1:
What is this Table?
This table lists the Housing Preservation Departments (HPD) unique Complaint types, complaint details and the location types present in the 311 Data on the Open Data Portal.
This HPD table is separated from other agency complaint details because HPD complaints correlate to feild that indicates which Buidling Management Program (BMP) the complaint type is associated with.

How you can use this table
• You can use this table to help you identify new types of complaints that are captured by 311.
• Use this table to get a sense of what services a Agency is responsible for.

Notes:
• "BMP" - Building Management Program.
•  "DPM", "DAMP" - Building Types managed by HPD under BMP programs. This information is used by 311 to determine the types of complaints applicable to a particular address.
• "Sec8" - Section 8 housing, managed by HPD under BMP program.
• "PVT" - Privately-Owned buildings; complaints are accepted even though they are not managed by HPD.
